## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt`
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] Regression test added (for bug fixes)
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing surface changed (`README.md`, `docs/SPEC.md`)
- [ ] `tests/docs_consistency.rs` passes (no doc drift introduced)
